about.title: About
about.subtitle: // Who I am
paragraphs: Senior UX/UI Designer with 6+ years building user-centered digital products across in-vehicle HMI, connected mobility, and web/mobile interfaces.

Currently embedded in Volkswagen Trucks & Buses via EDAG Group, I own end-to-end UX for infotainment, digital instrument clusters, and companion apps — from discovery and technical requirements to supplier coordination and production handoff.

I combine product thinking, UX research, and high-fidelity UI with hands-on front-end skills (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind) and an AI-augmented workflow using Cursor and MCP to prototype faster and tighten design–engineering alignment.

footer.tagline:
